meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no coding experience (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no coding experience. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup (Beginner Checklist)
content.seo_description: Overcome no-coding barriers as a founder. Learn how to leverage Claude Code and Antigravity to build, deploy, and monetize your SaaS faster than ever.
content.answer_block: Claude Code bridges the gap between idea and execution for non-technical founders. By integrating Claude's reasoning with the Antigravity workflow, you can automate repository scaffolding, implement business logic, and debug complex features via natural language, effectively turning your vision into a production-ready SaaS product without writing manual code.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is littered with brilliant ideas that never saw the light of day because the founder was trapped behind a wall of syntax errors and infrastructure complexity. You don't need a Computer Science degree to disrupt an industry; you need the right leverage.

Today, we dismantle the barrier between 'founder' and 'developer.' By utilizing Claude Code—an autonomous coding agent—and the Antigravity framework, you can transform your strategic vision into executable logic. This isn't just about writing code; it's about building a scalable business asset that works for you while you sleep.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish your development workspace. We prepare the directory structure so Claude Code can map your project's architecture effectively.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a professional SaaS project structure with a clean README, /src folder, and a base configuration for a modern web application.

steps.title: Defining Business Logic
steps.description: Translate your revenue model into technical requirements. We instruct Claude to build the core value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema and controller logic for a subscription-based user authentication and dashboard system.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement user authentication and stripe integration for SaaS dashboard'

steps.title: Iterative Feature Injection
steps.description: Build your MVP features one by one, ensuring each module is tested and functional before moving to the next.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add a feature that allows users to export data to CSV. Include error handling and data validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'csv export functionality with validation'

steps.title: Automated Debugging Cycle
steps.description: Use Claude Code to identify bottlenecks or bugs in the current build, ensuring high-quality output.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for potential performance bottlenecks and security vulnerabilities. Provide a fix summary.

steps.title: Deployment Preparation
steps.description: Prepare your application for production environment deployment, ensuring all environment variables are correctly mapped.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready Dockerfile and a deployment script for Vercel/AWS.

pro_tips: Always use the '--verbose' flag in Claude Code to understand the 'why' behind the logic it generates; this is your best learning tool.
Treat your prompts like a Product Requirement Document (PRD); the more context on user intent you provide, the higher the code quality.
Keep your repository modular; ask Claude to break large files into smaller, maintainable components to prevent context window degradation.
Audit the generated code for security secrets; never allow Claude to hardcode API keys directly into your repository.
Use Antigravity's 'context-snap' feature to lock in successful code states before performing major architectural changes.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is running, perform a 'smoke test' by deploying to a staging environment, then transition to gathering user feedback to iterate on your core value proposition.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the toolkit to outpace traditional dev shops and iterate at the speed of thought. The only thing missing is execution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
